entry_exit.entry: Buy the asset with the lower price and sell the asset with the higher price to capture the spread.
entry_exit.exit: Close the position once the spread narrows to the target threshold.

signal_logic.trigger: Monitor the price spread between spot crypto prices and derivative contract prices on major crypto exchanges. When the spread exceeds a certain threshold, execute a trade to capture the arbitrage opportunity.

position_sizing.description: Size positions based on the magnitude of the price spread and overall market liquidity. Smaller position sizes are recommended for less liquid markets.
